creator: admin@vladiom.com.ua
text:
In the menu xfce-4.12_1 doesn't show icons apache-openoffice-4.1.2_4 (see attachment).

root@vladiom:~ # pkg info | grep apache-openoffice
apache-openoffice-4.1.2_4      Integrated wordprocessor/dbase/spreadsheet/drawing/chart/browser

For example, in the desktop file "calc.desktop" and icon name in the "/usr/local/share/icons/" are the same:
root@vladiom:~ # grep Icon /usr/local/share/applications/openoffice-4.1.2/calc.desktop
Icon=openoffice4-calc
root@vladiom:~ # cd /usr/local/share/icons/hicolor/48x48/apps && ls | grep openoffice4-calc
openoffice4-calc.png


<uname>
FreeBSD 10.3-RC2 amd64

<make.conf>
CPUTYPE?=core2
OPTIONS_SET=CUPS
WITHOUT_LPR=YES
DEFAULT_VERSIONS=apache=2.4
QT4_OPTIONS=CUPS NAS QGTKSTYLE
LOCALIZED_LANG=ru
DEFAULT_VERSIONS=perl5=5.20
MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes
DEFAULT_VERSIONS=mysql=5.7
